title: Law’s Ultimatum
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is law’s ultimatum.
scene: The scene focuses on law’s ultimatum, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll take down all the yonkou!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eh!? What! He's not even human!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The chance of my plan succeeding is...well..

summary: Law’s Ultimatum. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
